assertionResults.title: /coins/markets exposes degraded seeded-bootstrap null-shape explicitly
assertionResults.summary: Both seeded-bootstrap and degraded-seeded-bootstrap route responses kept bitcoin identity/current_price while richer live-looking fields stayed null, matching the diagnostics runtime semantics for bootstrap-shaped data.

steps.expected: Validation API available with bootstrap-compatible diagnostics context.
steps.observed: HTTP 200; runtime already exposed validation_override.mode=seeded_bootstrap and hot_paths.shared_market_snapshot.source_class=seeded_bootstrap.

steps.expected: HTTP 200 success envelope for seeded_bootstrap override.

steps.observed: HTTP 200; readiness.state=starting, degraded.active=False, source_class=seeded_bootstrap, provider_count=1, last_successful_live_refresh_at present.

steps.action: Exercise /coins/markets for bitcoin with price-change windows and sparkline under seeded_bootstrap
steps.expected: Identity fields and maybe current_price remain, but richer market fields stay absent/null when bootstrap semantics do not imply live completeness.
steps.observed: HTTP 200; bitcoin row returned with id/symbol/name/image/current_price=69134.40833333334 while market_cap, total_volume, market_cap_rank, high_24h, low_24h, ATH/ATL fields, last_updated, and all requested price_change_percentage_*_in_currency fields were null; sparkline_in_7d.price was an empty array.

steps.command: curl -sS -X POST -H 'content-type: application/json' --data '{"mode":"degraded_seeded_bootstrap"}' 'http://127.0.0.1:3102/diagnostics/runtime/degraded_state' && curl -sS -X GET 'http://127.0.0.1:3102/diagnostics/runtime' && curl -sS -X GET 'http://127.0.0.1:3102/coins/markets?vs_currency=usd&ids=bitcoin&price_change_percentage=1h,24h,7d,14d,30d,200d,1y&sparkline=true'
steps.expected: Diagnostics/runtime should report degraded_seeded_bootstrap and /coins/markets should preserve the null-shaped richer fields.
steps.observed: Override POST returned HTTP 200 with data.mode=degraded_seeded_bootstrap and cache_revision=3. Diagnostics then reported readiness.state=degraded, degraded.active=True, source_class=degraded_seeded_bootstrap, provider_count=0, and last_successful_live_refresh_at=null. The bitcoin /coins/markets row still kept current_price while richer fields remained null; sparkline_in_7d.price contained bootstrap series values.

steps.expected: Override cleared back to neutral state.
steps.observed: HTTP 200; response data.mode=off, data.cache_revision=4. Follow-up diagnostics showed validation_override.active=False.

summary: Validated VAL-MARKETS-010 on the live validation API. /coins/markets for bitcoin preserved identity/current_price while richer live-looking fields remained null under bootstrap-shaped semantics, and the override was restored to mode=off at the end.
